34b3a0fcd69f2e51554ee427c444be549bf6bce5.response: {"facts":[{"text":"The standard deduction for Head of household in tax year 2025 is $23,625.","subject":"TY2025 standard deduction for Head of household","attribute":"amount","value":"$23,625"}]}

773f00a29856454166a2394beee0916b9687399f.response: {"facts":[{"text":"The standard deduction for Married filing jointly in tax year 2025 is $31,500.","subject":"TY2025 standard deduction for Married filing jointly","attribute":"amount","value":"$31,500"}]}

80ae5eb4bd52f2d7b2f85a0cf39f0c27c620ca3a.response: {"facts":[{"text":"Federal income tax brackets are marginal, meaning each rate applies only to the portion of taxable income that falls within that bracket's range.","subject":"Federal income tax brackets","attribute":"nature","value":"marginal"},{"text":"To calculate total tax, sum the tax from each bracket.","subject":"Total tax calculation","attribute":"method","value":"sum the tax from each bracket."}]}

8701c5253213fbcbf8efc996aaaf037024bea113.response: {"facts":[{"text":"The TY2025 standard deduction for Married filing jointly is $32,200.","subject":"TY2025 standard deduction for Married filing jointly","attribute":"amount","value":"$32,200"}]}

ad9154b49b5f6ac46084c492f397de59a4990d15.response: {"facts":[{"text":"The TY2025 ordinary income tax bracket for Married filing jointly is 10% for income up to $23,850.","subject":"TY2025 ordinary income tax bracket for Married filing jointly up to $23,850","attribute":"rate","value":"10%"},{"text":"The TY2025 ordinary income tax bracket for Married filing jointly is 12% for income between $23,850 and $96,950.","subject":"TY2025 ordinary income tax bracket for Married filing jointly $23,850-$96,950","attribute":"rate","value":"12%"},{"text":"The TY2025 ordinary income tax bracket for Married filing jointly is 22% for income between $96,950 and $206,700.","subject":"TY2025 ordinary income tax bracket for Married filing jointly $96,950-$206,700","attribute":"rate","value":"22%"},{"text":"The TY2025 ordinary income tax bracket for Married filing jointly is 24% for income between $206,700 and $394,600.","subject":"TY2025 ordinary income tax bracket for Married filing jointly $206,700-$394,600","attribute":"rate","value":"24%"},{"text":"The TY2025 ordinary income tax bracket for Married filing jointly is 32% for income between $394,600 and $501,050.","subject":"TY2025 ordinary income tax bracket for Married filing jointly $394,600-$501,050","attribute":"rate","value":"32%"},{"text":"The TY2025 ordinary income tax bracket for Married filing jointly is 35% for income between $501,050 and $751,600.","subject":"TY2025 ordinary income tax bracket for Married filing jointly $501,050-$751,600","attribute":"rate","value":"35%"},{"text":"The TY2025 ordinary income tax bracket for Married filing jointly is 37% for income above $751,600.","subject":"TY2025 ordinary income tax bracket for Married filing jointly above $751,600","attribute":"rate","value":"37%"}]}

c759d1e66d72adaabe2894055a5b8671a8781c5e.response: {"facts":[{"text":"W-2 box 2 reports federal income tax already withheld from the employee's pay.","subject":"W-2 box 2","attribute":"contents","value":"federal income tax already withheld from the employee's pay."},{"text":"W-2 box 2 is entered on Form 1040 line 25a.","subject":"W-2 box 2","attribute":"line number","value":"Form 1040 line 25a"},{"text":"W-2 box 2 counts as a payment toward the year's tax.","subject":"W-2 box 2","attribute":"payment status","value":"counts as a payment toward the year's tax."}]}

da6902d1ad7aeca01e5abdb6ab5cf9c9c79c9707.response: {"facts":[{"text":"The TY2025 ordinary income tax bracket for Single filers is 10% for income up to $11,925.","subject":"TY2025 ordinary income tax bracket for Single filers up to $11,925","attribute":"rate","value":"10%"},{"text":"The TY2025 ordinary income tax bracket for Single filers is 12% for income between $11,925 and $48,475.","subject":"TY2025 ordinary income tax bracket for Single filers $11,925-$48,475","attribute":"rate","value":"12%"},{"text":"The TY2025 ordinary income tax bracket for Single filers is 22% for income between $48,475 and $103,350.","subject":"TY2025 ordinary income tax bracket for Single filers $48,475-$103,350","attribute":"rate","value":"22%"},{"text":"The TY2025 ordinary income tax bracket for Single filers is 24% for income between $103,350 and $197,300.","subject":"TY2025 ordinary income tax bracket for Single filers $103,350-$197,300","attribute":"rate","value":"24%"},{"text":"The TY2025 ordinary income tax bracket for Single filers is 32% for income between $197,300 and $250,525.","subject":"TY2025 ordinary income tax bracket for Single filers $197,300-$250,525","attribute":"rate","value":"32%"},{"text":"The TY2025 ordinary income tax bracket for Single filers is 35% for income between $250,525 and $626,350.","subject":"TY2025 ordinary income tax bracket for Single filers $250,525-$626,350","attribute":"rate","value":"35%"},{"text":"The TY2025 ordinary income tax bracket for Single filers is 37% for income above $626,350.","subject":"TY2025 ordinary income tax bracket for Single filers above $626,350","attribute":"rate","value":"37%"}]}

eee4760489436d49e60b1964e9c2ae6bf58c3c57.response: {"facts":[{"text":"The standard deduction for Single filers in TY2025 is $15,750.","subject":"TY2025 Form 1040 standard deduction for Single filers","attribute":"amount","value":"$15,750"},{"text":"The standard deduction for Married filing jointly in TY2025 is $31,500.","subject":"TY2025 Form 1040 standard deduction for Married filing jointly","attribute":"amount","value":"$31,500"},{"text":"The standard deduction for Married filing separately in TY2025 is $15,750.","subject":"TY2025 Form 1040 standard deduction for Married filing separately","attribute":"amount","value":"$15,750"},{"text":"The standard deduction for Head of household in TY2025 is $23,625.","subject":"TY2025 Form 1040 standard deduction for Head of household","attribute":"amount","value":"$23,625"},{"text":"The standard deduction amounts are entered on Form 1040 line 12.","subject":"Form 1040 line 12","attribute":"contents","value":"standard deduction amounts"}]}

f5faaaef16b3415cb4e004ee2ac74f83a0ea5b52.response: {"facts":[{"text":"Form 1040 line 24 represents the total tax.","subject":"Form 1040 line 24","attribute":"contents","value":"total tax."},{"text":"Form 1040 line 25a represents the federal income tax withheld from W-2 box 2.","subject":"Form 1040 line 25a","attribute":"contents","value":"federal income tax withheld from W-2 box 2."},{"text":"Form 1040 line 33 represents the total payments, which include withholding plus any credits and estimated payments.","subject":"Form 1040 line 33","attribute":"contents","value":"total payments (withholding plus any credits and estimated payments)."}]}
